title: RoutingDecision
description: The output of the contextweaver routing phase. Contains one or more ChoiceCards and the selected item once the LLM has responded.

id.description: Unique identifier for this routing decision.

choice_cards.description: One or more ChoiceCards presented during this routing cycle.

selected_item_id.description: The ID of the SelectableItem chosen by the LLM. Null if the LLM response is still pending.

selected_card_id.description: The ID of the ChoiceCard that contained the selected item. Null if no selection has been made.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this routing decision was created.

context_summary.description: Optional brief summary of the context that drove this routing decision. For debugging and audit purposes.
